hook-rules.reason: SSH key access not permitted — ask the user to check manually

hook-rules.description: Block reading .env files — apply even inside repos since they may contain secrets
hook-rules.reason: Env files may contain secrets — read environment values another way or ask the user
Keychain database access not permitted — these contain stored credentials and secrets

hook-rules.description: Block force push to main or master
hook-rules.reason: Force pushing to main/master is not permitted — use a PR

hook-rules.description: Allow force push to feature branches (e.g. after rebase)
Allow reset hard to remote refs — approved workflow for syncing local to origin
Block reset hard to local refs — rewrites or discards local commit history
hook-rules.reason: Rewinding local commits can cause data loss — confirm this is intentional before proceeding

hook-rules.description: Block direct push to main or master — these require a PR
hook-rules.reason: Direct push to main/master not permitted — open a PR

hook-rules.description: Block gh api DELETE calls — these are irreversible
hook-rules.reason: Destructive GitHub API operations require manual confirmation from the user

hook-rules.description: Block rm targeting home directory — rm ~/ would destroy the user environment
hook-rules.reason: Removing files from the home directory root requires manual confirmation

hook-rules.description: Block recursive rm on .git directory — would destroy repository history
hook-rules.reason: Removing the .git directory would destroy repository history — do this manually if intentional

hook-rules.description: Block rm targeting /tmp root — removing the entire temp directory is likely unintended; specify a subdirectory
hook-rules.reason: Removing /tmp entirely or all its contents requires manual confirmation — specify a subdirectory instead (e.g. /tmp/my-build-dir)

hook-rules.description: Block piping network content to a shell
hook-rules.reason: Piping directly to a shell is a common code-execution attack — download the script first, inspect it, then run it

hook-rules.description: Allow writes to .claude/ inside a repo
Allow safe Claude Code built-in tools
Allow Bash commands — block only known-dangerous tools (denylist mode)
